empty_search: Badeeco lama helin oo la mid ah raadintaada.
empty_products: Weli badeeco ma jirto — ku dar badeecadaada ugu horreysa si aad u bilowdo.
backbar_subtitle: La soco isticmaalka badeecada xirfadeed ee adeeg kasta si aad u ogaato kharashka adeeg-kasta.
scan_hint: Kamaradda ku toosi barcode-ka badeecada, ka dibna ku qor magaca badeecada la mid ah hoosta. (Furitaanka barcode-ka waxaa mar dambe lagu xidhi karaa maktabad scanner ah.)
scan_err_unavailable: Kamaradu ma shaqeynayso. Ku qor magaca badeecada bedelkeeda.
scan_err_denied: Ogolaanshaha kamaradda waa la diiday. Ka dhig mid la ogolaaday dejinta biraawsarka ama ku qor magaca badeecada.
scan_err_notfound: Kamarad lama helin. Ku qor magaca badeecada bedelkeeda.
scan_err_generic: Kamaradda lama bilaabi karin. Ku qor magaca badeecada bedelkeeda.
